title: Vietnamese Com Tam
description: A popular Vietnamese dish made from broken rice, a variety of toppings, and a fried egg.

ingredients.name: Tam (Vietnamese fermented pork sausage)
ingredients.notes: optional or substitute with grilled pork

instructions: Cook the broken rice according to package instructions.
Fry the shallots until crispy and set aside.
Fry the tofu until golden brown and set aside.
Prepare the pickled carrots and daikon.
Cook the Tam sausage until caramelized, then set aside.
Combine the cooked rice, fried tofu, pickled carrots and daikon, fried shallots, and Tam sausage on a plate.
Drizzle the Mustardy sauce on top.
Serve the fried egg on top.
